arts.ttl: Brighton vs Liverpool – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Premier League winners Liverpool travel to Brighton for their final away match of the 2024/25 campaign. The Seagulls can climb into eighth place with a point, which will give them a faint hope of qualifying for Europe next season. Their opponents have nothing to play for except pride, having been confirmed as champions weeks ago. […] The post Brighton vs Liverpool – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: PLAY TEAMSHEET: Can YOU name the Brighton team that beat Liverpool in 2021? Or pick YOUR team and guess their starting XI
arts.sum: Every day we'll challenge you to name a different starting XI from the Premier League era. We'll give you a team's rough formation, and the number of letters in each player's name. Then it's up to you!
